# RoleSet

A role set defines a collection of roles that can be assigned to organization members


## Fields

| Field                                                                                 | Type                                                                                  | Required                                                                              | Description                                                                           |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `object`                                                                              | [Components\RoleSetObject](../../Models/Components/RoleSetObject.md)                  | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | N/A                                                                                   |
| `id`                                                                                  | *string*                                                                              | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | The unique identifier of the role set                                                 |
| `name`                                                                                | *string*                                                                              | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | The name of the role set                                                              |
| `key`                                                                                 | *string*                                                                              | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | A unique key for the role set (e.g., "role_set:default")                              |
| `description`                                                                         | *string*                                                                              | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | Optional description of the role set                                                  |
| `roles`                                                                               | array<[Components\RoleSetItem](../../Models/Components/RoleSetItem.md)>               | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | The list of roles in this role set                                                    |
| `defaultRole`                                                                         | [?Components\DefaultRole](../../Models/Components/DefaultRole.md)                     | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                    | The default role assigned to new organization members                                 |
| `creatorRole`                                                                         | [?Components\CreatorRole](../../Models/Components/CreatorRole.md)                     | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                    | The role assigned to the creator of an organization                                   |
| `type`                                                                                | [Components\Type](../../Models/Components/Type.md)                                    | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | The type of the role set ("initial" or "custom")                                      |
| `roleSetMigration`                                                                    | [?Components\RoleSetMigration](../../Models/Components/RoleSetMigration.md)           | :heavy_minus_sign:                                                                    | Active migration information, only present when status is "enqueued" or "in_progress" |
| `createdAt`                                                                           | *int*                                                                                 | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | Unix timestamp of role set creation                                                   |
| `updatedAt`                                                                           | *int*                                                                                 | :heavy_check_mark:                                                                    | Unix timestamp of last role set update                                                |
